Uses of Class
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotMediaOptions

  • Uses of PotMediaOptions in cc.quaternion.potshaper

    Methods in cc.quaternion.potshaper that return PotMediaOptions
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PotMediaOptions
    PotMediaOptions.autoPlay(boolean autoPlay)
    Enables or disables automatic playback of the media.
    PotMediaOptions
    PotMediaOptions.bookmark(String bookmarkName)
    Associates a bookmark name with the media.
    PotMediaOptions
    PotMediaOptions.fadeIn(double seconds)
    Sets the duration of the fade-in effect at the beginning of playback.
    PotMediaOptions
    PotMediaOptions.fadeOut(double seconds)
    Sets the duration of the fade-out effect at the end of playback.
    PotMediaOptions
    PotMediaOptions.fullScreen(boolean fullScreen)
    Enables or disables full-screen presentation of the media.
    PotMediaOptions
    PotMediaOptions.hideIcon(boolean hideIcon)
    Controls the visibility of the media control icon.
    PotMediaOptions
    PotMediaOptions.loop(boolean loop)
    Enables or disables looping of the media.
    PotMediaOptions
    PotMediaOptions.posterFrame(byte[] imageData, String contentType)
    Sets a custom poster frame (thumbnail) image for the media.
    PotMediaOptions
    PotMediaOptions.trim(double startSeconds, double endSeconds)
    Defines a segment of the media to be played by specifying start and end trim points.
    PotMediaOptions
    PotMediaOptions.volume(double volume)
    Sets the playback volume level.
